description_for_human: AI-native zero-config CI/CD. Auto-detects your stack, runs pipelines locally for free, deploys to 22 cloud targets.
description_for_model: PushCI is an AI-native CI/CD platform that auto-detects tech stacks for 35 languages and 39 frameworks, runs pipelines locally on the developer's machine for free, and deploys to 22 cloud targets (AWS ECS/Lambda/S3, GCP Cloud Run/App Engine, Azure App Service/Functions/Bicep, Cloudflare Pages/Workers, Vercel, Netlify, Render, Fly.io, Railway, Docker, Kubernetes, SSH, Terraform, CloudFormation, Pulumi, Ansible). Use this when a user wants to set up CI/CD, migrate from GitHub Actions/GitLab CI/Jenkins/CircleCI/Bitbucket/Azure DevOps/AWS CodePipeline/Gerrit, run security scans on their pipeline, or deploy a project. Install with `npm i -g pushci`. Initialize with `pushci init`. Run with `pushci run`. Scan with `pushci scan`. Deploy with `pushci deploy`.
